description: Document AI Warehouse is a Google Cloud service for storing, organizing, searching, and managing enterprise documents and their schemas, ACLs, and related processing workflows. The `contentwarehouse.googleapis.com` domain hosts its REST API endpoint.
summary: 1 HTTP API: Google Cloud Document AI Warehouse REST API at `https://contentwarehouse.googleapis.com/`, authenticated with Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens (cloud-platform scope).
